3286846.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_hello_2
3286846.transcript: Hehehehe, happy to be a team!

15174961.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
15174961.transcript: Spot on with the follow-up, Lancelot!

20912046.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
20912046.transcript: Let's move out! But keep your eyes peeled!

23223670.label: PL0700_vo_MOV_wait_cold_3
23223670.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah

25417301.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
25417301.transcript: Sorry, we don't have time to entertain buffoons.

25719995.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
25719995.transcript: There's more where that came from!

33670218.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
33670218.transcript: Incarnation of a god or not, we'll get Eid back!

35216626.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
35216626.transcript: That's because we still have something to fight for.

48176673.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
48176673.transcript: There's nothing to fear! Right, guys!

51442162.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
51442162.transcript: Hah! Hah! Spineless bunch, weren't they?

65810077.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
65810077.transcript: Not bad for a thousand-year-old dirt clod!

78839571.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
78839571.transcript: Let's give this faker a taste of its own medicine!

87872556.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
87872556.transcript: This brawl is in the bag!

105289729.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
105289729.transcript: We can always rely on ol' Vaseraga!

110093876.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_2
110093876.transcript: Our teamwork is not to be trifled with!

121740977.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
121740977.transcript: And nothing whets our fangs more than a lady with some moxie!

123925697.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
123925697.transcript: Stay focused! We can defeat him!

141418239.label: PL0700_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
141418239.transcript: Go back to whence you came!

161120482.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
161120482.transcript: Well, who do we have here?

164859329.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_box_check_l_3
164859329.transcript: To the finder go the spoils!

165598543.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
165598543.transcript: Hmph. Ha! That was easy enough.

172403082.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
172403082.transcript: Go on! Show us what you're made of!

195124175.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
195124175.transcript: Come on, pack! At this rate, Galloans is gonna outshine us!

214398629.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
214398629.transcript: You just don't know when to give up, Lilith!

219326958.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_lockon_3
219326958.transcript: We'll make obedient pups of them!

221330239.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
221330239.transcript: Alright! Heads on a swivel, hands on your weapons!

233727577.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
233727577.transcript: The breeze feels the same no matter where you go.

248407079.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
248407079.transcript: I'm sorry it's so cold, guys!

250001700.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
250001700.transcript: Why don't you take the front line?

255417272.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
255417272.transcript: We will stop you! You have my word!

267512526.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
267512526.transcript: It was easy to follow your lead.

270159621.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
270159621.transcript: Heh, what a nice thing to say.

271216250.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
271216250.transcript: They're as strong as they are loyal.

272703502.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
272703502.transcript: A primal that controls the wind? We can handle that.

280037610.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
280037610.transcript: He just keeps coming back for more!

284912488.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
284912488.transcript: Neither side is willing to back down!

291487507.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
291487507.transcript: Words aren't gonna get through to him!

307902657.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
307902657.transcript: I'll find a safe spot and support from afar!

309001553.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_C
309001553.transcript: Let's be careful how we approach them.

319208152.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
319208152.transcript: Then let's put an end to it! Come on!

319835972.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
319835972.transcript: Think my pack's trying to adopt you, Vane?

324783780.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
324783780.transcript: This monster looks fearsome. Be careful!

340847590.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_win_6
340847590.transcript: Hmph! Ha! This pack stands strong!

367646450.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
367646450.transcript: This place... it's beyond death itself!

368611610.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
368611610.transcript: Hmph. There. You learned some manners.

375692214.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
375692214.transcript: Hmph. You're kidding. It's over already?

382885625.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
382885625.transcript: We beat it before! We can do it again!

389005937.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
389005937.transcript: This power... it's unlike anything I've ever felt!

389559610.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
389559610.transcript: Get out of our way already!

405579889.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
405579889.transcript: Hmph. And you were the very picture of chivalry.

406211408.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
406211408.transcript: Hehe, look at how excited they are!

410595344.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_FIRST
410595344.transcript: Sorry, but I'm gonna turn you into a scrap heap!

421833011.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
421833011.transcript: That fire of yours never fades!

426058586.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_2
426058586.transcript: I knew we could do it!

427220749.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
427220749.transcript: Work together and there's nothing we can't overcome!

428105673.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
428105673.transcript: Well, you almost swept me off my feet!

437973358.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
437973358.transcript: We can handle it, right? Right?

445963794.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
445963794.transcript: How do we bring down a walking tower?

462901055.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_A
462901055.transcript: Then let's keep our guard up!

471353390.label: PL0700_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_3
471353390.transcript: I thought I would disappear forever.

472391611.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_comeback_2
472391611.transcript: It'll take more than that to keep me down!

476555905.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
476555905.transcript: Hmph. Ha! We're the top dogs here!

492176243.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
492176243.transcript: Hmph. Huh! You hungry for more?

512228798.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
512228798.transcript: Hmph. I'm not one to hold back.

536147683.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
536147683.transcript: No better way to teach discipline!

548237986.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0200
548237986.transcript: Top of your form as always!

548586424.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
548586424.transcript: You're an airship of strength, Rackam!

558509387.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
558509387.transcript: You deserve what we're going to do to you!

599539137.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
599539137.transcript: Don't run off, guys! That goes double for you, Fuji!

611665164.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
611665164.transcript: Id, you coward! Just remember you brought this on yourself!

617166426.label: PL0700_vo_MOV_wait_cold_2
617166426.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah

621284660.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
621284660.transcript: You're welcome to join my pack anytime.

628036976.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
628036976.transcript: Hmph. What a shame. I was expecting more.

630233381.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
630233381.transcript: My blood runs as hot as yours. Figuratively.

630395997.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
630395997.transcript: And I guess that's a good thing!

632423958.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_C
632423958.transcript: Be careful! Anything could happen here!

636735511.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
636735511.transcript: I've been saving a special punishment just for you!

640397646.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
640397646.transcript: We're always ready for the chase!

642604569.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
642604569.transcript: Your swordplay only grows more impressive.

642978281.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
642978281.transcript: They're feeling the pressure! Watch out!

657046889.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
657046889.transcript: Hehe, all that training has finally paid off!

658092776.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
658092776.transcript: He's got us against the wall!

658687395.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
658687395.transcript: It's like a shadow of a primal!

660412588.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
660412588.transcript: You're not the alpha here! Come on, pack!

664130678.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0100
664130678.transcript: That's what I call slaying the audience!

670780537.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
670780537.transcript: We need to pick up our pace!

684537851.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
684537851.transcript: I'll pay you back for everything you've done!

701994878.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
701994878.transcript: We won't get smoked for this, right?

706423337.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
706423337.transcript: It's a relief having you in our pack.

708924371.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
708924371.transcript: They've been with me through... a lot.

717923266.label: PL0700_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
717923266.transcript: Hmph. Tell me, you learn your lesson?

726106386.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
726106386.transcript: We look out for each other, right?

730596925.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
730596925.transcript: Listen, trespassers! When I say leave, you say yes, ma'am!

730713871.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
730713871.transcript: Fujii! Nikola! Get ready for the next attack!

732350053.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
732350053.transcript: Come on, guys! Lay them all to rest!

735955256.label: PL0700_vo_SP_charge_name_3
735955256.transcript: The pack that slays together stays together!

743881124.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
743881124.transcript: Hmph. Beppo and I have got this.

747631591.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_A
747631591.transcript: I'm getting tired of their antics!

749920854.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
749920854.transcript: Momo, sniff out any trouble, would you?

761609238.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
761609238.transcript: We don't have time to mess around with this thing!

764984479.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
764984479.transcript: Don't mess with the white dragons!

766155619.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
766155619.transcript: Aww, who's a good ancient snake?

779695428.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
779695428.transcript: Well, teamwork's kind of my thing.

781027239.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_1
781027239.transcript: The next will be even better!

782493257.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
782493257.transcript: Nicola, Fuji, I know it's scary, but try to ignore the noise!

782598472.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
782598472.transcript: Hah! You can lead the pack any day!

790764901.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
790764901.transcript: My pack can't help but feel curious about your scythe.

798372447.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
798372447.transcript: Does that mean I'm hard to work with?

799966293.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_2
799966293.transcript: I could keep this up all day!

826858558.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
826858558.transcript: No one beats on my friends!

834256232.label: PL0700_vo_MOV_wait_cold_4
834256232.transcript: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah

835009158.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
835009158.transcript: Yeah, I'm really proud of them.

862499858.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
862499858.transcript: It doesn't matter the foe! We'll put them in their place!

872193021.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
872193021.transcript: We need to force our way through!

875746969.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
875746969.transcript: Aww, why don't you all give Rackam thank you snuggles?

884178130.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
884178130.transcript: Yep, you better fear the fangs!

892381454.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
892381454.transcript: We sure taught them a lesson!

895995408.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
895995408.transcript: Siegfried, you're going to make us cry.

909580480.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
909580480.transcript: Push through! We've almost got her!

909734254.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
909734254.transcript: We've come too far to back down now!

918333386.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
918333386.transcript: They had front row seats to the wonderful world of pain!

926667557.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
926667557.transcript: My pups really respect you, you know.

932119411.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
932119411.transcript: You work magic with the sword!

943898008.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
943898008.transcript: My pack is twice as fierce now!

947028938.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
947028938.transcript: Don't your fists ever get sore from punching?

947137910.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
947137910.transcript: Heh, should we start a band?

948384378.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
948384378.transcript: All right! Regrouped and ready to go!

949476250.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
949476250.transcript: Show it how far we've come!

952283794.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
952283794.transcript: Yep, just sit back and enjoy the experience.

955535832.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
955535832.transcript: We can't let its powers take hold!

961241193.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
961241193.transcript: Behave! Or you'll eat my whip!

970429521.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
970429521.transcript: My pack and I are devoted to each other.

975119348.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
975119348.transcript: You did all that with your bare hands?

975670812.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
975670812.transcript: My pack's taken a shine to you.

978195932.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
978195932.transcript: You were amazing as well, Catalina!

982756205.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
982756205.transcript: Having your midlife crisis already? Wow, Rackam!

983146489.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
983146489.transcript: So... who's ready for a walk?

985568748.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
985568748.transcript: There it is! Now let's bust it open!

985736501.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
985736501.transcript: Looks like Fuji wants to be your best friend!

993505179.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
993505179.transcript: That's more like it! Let's finish this!

998615660.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
998615660.transcript: Aww, don't be scared of that big pineapple.

1001172385.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
1001172385.transcript: Let's set up a playdate after this is all over!

1003896110.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
1003896110.transcript: Get a taste of your own medicine!

1004902355.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
1004902355.transcript: Next time I'll pull out the big guns!

1011177450.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
1011177450.transcript: Desperate times call for desperate measures!

1015851094.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
1015851094.transcript: This thing isn't so tough. We can take it!

1016769022.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
1016769022.transcript: Right! We'll look out for any strong attacks!

1021878639.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_call_1
1021878639.transcript: Where are you going? Over here!

1033445238.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
1033445238.transcript: I don't like that gleam in your eye.

1041450837.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
1041450837.transcript: Hear that, Fujin? You're such a good boy!

1045325491.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
1045325491.transcript: Let's take it slowly. One step at a time.

3918153.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
3918153.transcript: It looks that way, but me and the pets know exactly what we're doing.

9059721.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
9059721.transcript: Hear that, guys? Fediel likes you!

49378159.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
49378159.transcript: I'm proud of our little family.

50336867.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
50336867.transcript: Oh! What tremendous strength you have!

65460664.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
65460664.transcript: Thanks. That means a lot to us.

80649617.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
80649617.transcript: Your darkness is deeper than Celeste's. That's a first.

99236338.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
99236338.transcript: See? Working together isn't so bad!

114132313.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
114132313.transcript: Oh yeah! We're ready to go!

185586090.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
185586090.transcript: Come on, Pack! We're almost there!

196710210.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
196710210.transcript: I was thinking the same thing!

213845386.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
213845386.transcript: Great job, everyone! Maglielle's gonna pet you all later!

250553935.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
250553935.transcript: Aww, I didn't know you were one to care. How nice.

264122531.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
264122531.transcript: Hope the next one's just as deadly!

297932161.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
297932161.transcript: Our bite is just as strong as our bark.

322102314.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
322102314.transcript: The pets never miss a day of drills.

337256801.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
337256801.transcript: Thanks, Charlotta! Happy to have you!

355702495.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
355702495.transcript: No way! I'll tell you when to stop!

366699134.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
366699134.transcript: It's the least I could do.

379629742.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
379629742.transcript: Hear that, everyone? You're such good boys!

386286595.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
386286595.transcript: Nikola, please! You can play with Fraux after the fight!

420455905.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
420455905.transcript: I barely blinked and you were already gone!

424442953.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
424442953.transcript: Of course not! There are no weak links in this crew!

460914711.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
460914711.transcript: Hear that, everyone? Ghandagoza praised you!

474750415.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
474750415.transcript: All a matter of training and obedience.

480353743.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
480353743.transcript: You might've scared my pets a little.

486245742.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
486245742.transcript: Oh! They're made of ectoplasm! Blast away!

492686065.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
492686065.transcript: You're strong AND smart. Nice combo.

570114647.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
570114647.transcript: Peppo, heal! You can bug Narmaya later!

609082590.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
609082590.transcript: The six dragons are so strong!

631097814.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
631097814.transcript: I wish I could see that again.

691786338.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
691786338.transcript: The real punishment is yet to come!

693108642.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
693108642.transcript: You mean my pets? Oh, they know.

710515885.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
710515885.transcript: Let's keep up the good work!

723258123.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
723258123.transcript: No! Down, Beppo! Gallanza has his hands full!

750172982.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
750172982.transcript: Your lightning won't hurt my pets. Go on, fire at will!

761469748.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
761469748.transcript: I'm not the one you should be petting!

766559911.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
766559911.transcript: Our vest makes the prettiest flashes when you attack!

771878919.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
771878919.transcript: A little practice goes a long way.

780003015.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
780003015.transcript: Let's keep it up, you guys!

819167487.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
819167487.transcript: Hehe, I think Momo just wants to be friends, Gallanza!

835344557.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
835344557.transcript: Right as rain! Thanks for asking!

845730029.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
845730029.transcript: Let's stay out of her way, guys!

855657915.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
855657915.transcript: The pets feel right at home with you, Vane!

927478948.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
927478948.transcript: I rely on them every single day!

954011698.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
954011698.transcript: What's the matter, GG? Maglielle won't hurt you.

1008448093.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
1008448093.transcript: Ouroboros fights well with our pack!

1012584791.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
1012584791.transcript: Rosetta's magic is like something from a fairytale!

1032089000.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
1032089000.transcript: Gigi, stop chasing the butterflies! This is serious!

1036069629.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
1036069629.transcript: We love each other like a family!

1045198878.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
1045198878.transcript: We still have a lot of pain to dish out!

1055825750.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
1055825750.transcript: That was intense! You covered the sky in arrows!

1068615654.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
1068615654.transcript: If we see an opening, we'll take it!

1073140016.label: PL0700_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
1073140016.transcript: You made the shot from back there?

30311463.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
30311463.transcript: I feel so much more confident with you at our side.

61117071.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
61117071.transcript: Huff... huff... huff... huff... huff... huff...

106658764.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
106658764.transcript: I wonder if anyone can stand up to your might.

137974582.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
137974582.transcript: I'm not really the gym type... One... Two... Three... Four... Five... Six... I told you!

152448875.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
152448875.transcript: Like I've never heard that one before.

270683386.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
270683386.transcript: We know a thing or two about teamwork!

284077776.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
284077776.transcript: Hehe, okay I get the message. We'll play after the fighting's over!

358315738.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
358315738.transcript: Oh, it's okay, Momo. Sovahn's a friend.

359105856.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
359105856.transcript: Okay. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six. Hey! That wasn't half bad!

373342431.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
373342431.transcript: Oh my! It was like your arrows had minds of their own!

454937994.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
454937994.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six!

516454640.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
516454640.transcript: Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh!

531037186.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
531037186.transcript: Nicola! I know you love her but no tackling friends!

552842329.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
552842329.transcript: You too, Twin! You make this look easy!

1042859732.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_2
1042859732.transcript: Okay, you can do this. Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! Ugh! U

46842769.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
46842769.transcript: Down, GG, down! I told you already, no jumping on the angel!

259101705.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
259101705.transcript: I am a spirit. I'm basically cheating.

490618366.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
490618366.transcript: Oh, you're the bestest boys! Aren't they just the goodest dogs you ever saw, Sandalphon?

997275471.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
997275471.transcript: Horse of the dead? Why did you make a sound evil?

29114881.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
29114881.transcript: Time for lunch! Fuji, I fed you earlier, remember? You'll eat anything, won't you, boy?

217852162.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
217852162.transcript: How about a snack? Down boy, this is people food. What a healthy appetite.

1032187383.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
1032187383.transcript: I'm famished! Fuji, you lunkhead! Seriously, this is the last time!
